Patch Set 1:

The developer doing the work here needs to at a minimum post deploy results - I mentioned the CD build because it does it for you

run healthcheck in oom/kubernetes/robot
run "kubectl get pods --all-namespaces"

see TSC-25
The official CD (Integration) job is below - once a day
http://onapci.org/grafana/d/8cGRqBOmz/daily-summary?orgId=1
http://onapci.org/jenkins/

Unofficial CD jobs (Logging/OOM) are here - every 8 hours on azure and every 2 on aws (log/pomba/dmaap subset)
http://jenkins.onap.info/job/oom-cd-master-azure/31/console
http://jenkins.onap.info/job/oom-cd-master/
